title: cynoglossum alatum
intro: Cynoglossum alatum, also known as the Winged Balloonflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum alatum include its ability to boost the immune system, treat digestive problems, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
